defs: same as 渤海[Bo2 Hai3], Bohai Sea between Liaoning and Shandong
Bohai Sea, between Liaoning and Shandong
Parhae, Korean kingdom in Manchuria and Siberia, 698–926
lit. blue seas where once was mulberry fields (idiom, from 史記|史记[Shi3 ji4], Record of the Grand Historian); time brings great changes
